chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Reward of Visiting the Prophet {saws} and the Imams {a.s}, Peace Be Upon Them All

text: 3194 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : «سَتُدْفَنُ بَضْعَةٌ مِنِّي بِأَرْضِ خُرَاسَانَ لاَ يَزُورُهَا مُؤْمِنٌ إِلاَّ أَوْجَبَ اَللَّهُ لَهُ، اَلْجَنَّةَ وَ حَرَّمَ جَسَدَهُ عَلَى اَلنَّارِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3194 - The Messenger of Allah (swt), peace be upon him and his family, said:
"A part of me will be buried in the land of Khurasan. No believer will visit it except that Allah (swt) will make Paradise obligatory for them and will forbid their body from the Fire."
